LanguageData.VCE_AgaveNectar.description: A thin and semi-sweet syrup extracted from agave, known for its healing and anti-inflammatory properties. Although healthier than sugar, its high fructose content may be harmful if taken constantly.
LanguageData.VCE_AgaveNectar.label: maguey syrup
LanguageData.VCE_Allspice.description: An anomalous, leafy vine bearing tiny unpalatable green fruits. When ground finely during cooking the fruits release a complex, peppery flavor, perfect for spicing dishes.
LanguageData.VCE_Allspice.label: allspice plant
LanguageData.VCE_BearffaloCheese.description: An strange blue cheese created from Bearffalo milk. Very nutritive, but very high in saturated fats.
LanguageData.VCE_BearffaloCheese.label: bearffalo cheese
LanguageData.VCE_BeeCheese.description: A delicious cheese extracted from milk created by lactic bees. Yeah, best not to think about it.
LanguageData.VCE_BeeCheese.label: bee cheese
LanguageData.VCE_BlueCheese.description: Blue cheese is cheese made with cultures of the mold Penicillium, giving it blue spots or veins. This carries a "distinct" smell.
LanguageData.VCE_BlueCheese.label: blue cheese
LanguageData.VCE_BrownCheese.description: A brown coloured cheese, similar in taste to Cheddar but with roasted nut overtones. Not very nutritive, but very pleasurable to eat.
LanguageData.VCE_BrownCheese.label: brown cheese
LanguageData.VCE_CannedAP.description: Boiled eggs vacuum sealed and secured in a steel can effectively extending shelf life indefinitely. While edible cold right out of the can it's far more nourishing mixed into a meal and heated.\n\nCanned goods are intended as a way to preserve food and use it an an ingredient later, not as a final meal.
LanguageData.VCE_CannedAP.label: canned eggs
LanguageData.VCE_CannedFish.description: Fish vacuum sealed and secured in a steel can effectively extending shelf life indefinitely. While edible cold right out of the can it's far more nourishing mixed into a meal and heated.\n\nCanned goods are intended as a way to preserve food and use it an an ingredient later, not as a final meal.
LanguageData.VCE_CannedFish.label: canned fish
LanguageData.VCE_CannedFruit.description:
Cooked and preserved fruit in a hermetically sealed, durable container. Preserved food lasts indefinitely without refrigeration.

Fruit differs from produce in that it is specifically required in the production of desserts.

Canned goods are intended as a way to preserve food and use it an an ingredient later, not as a final meal.
LanguageData.VCE_CannedFruit.label: canned fruit
LanguageData.VCE_CannedMeat.description: Meat vacuum sealed and secured in a steel can effectively extending shelf life indefinitely. While edible cold right out of the can it's far more nourishing mixed into a meal and heated.\n\nCanned goods are intended as a way to preserve food and use it an an ingredient later, not as a final meal.
LanguageData.VCE_CannedMeat.label: canned meat
LanguageData.VCE_CannedProduce.description: Produce vacuum sealed and secured in a steel can effectively extending shelf life indefinitely. While edible cold right out of the can it's far more nourishing mixed into a meal and heated.\n\nCanned goods are intended as a way to preserve food and use it an an ingredient later, not as a final meal.
LanguageData.VCE_CannedProduce.label: canned produce
LanguageData.VCE_CanningMachine.description: A canning machine is an appliance to store preserved food inside metallic cans. Each canning operation needs a certain amount of Steel.
LanguageData.VCE_CanningMachine.label: canning machine
LanguageData.VCE_Cheese.description: Cheese is a dairy product, derived from milk and produced in a wide range of flavors, textures and forms by coagulation of the milk protein casein. Cheese is valued for its portability, long life, and high content of fat, protein, calcium, and phosphorus. It is more compact and has a longer shelf life than milk.
LanguageData.VCE_Cheese.label: cow cheese
LanguageData.VCE_CheesePress.description: A cheese press is a device for pressing whey from curds when making cheese. Pressing influences the cheese's hardness and texture and will also determine the shape of the block or wheel of cheese. This press also works as a ripening chamber, so the longer the cheese is left ripening, the higher its quality will be.
LanguageData.VCE_CheesePress.label: cheese press
LanguageData.VCE_ChickenffaloCheese.description: A very bland, almost tasteless cheese. The only good thing about it is that it ripens much faster than other cheeses.
LanguageData.VCE_ChickenffaloCheese.label: Chickenffalo cheese
LanguageData.VCE_ChocolateSyrup.description: A mixture of cocoa, water and sugar, forming a bitter-sweet pourable syrup, perfect for coating desserts. While still not good for you, chocolate syrup is not quite as bad as straight sugar.
LanguageData.VCE_ChocolateSyrup.label: chocolate syrup
LanguageData.VCE_CondimentPrepTable.description: A working table to cut, slice and prepare condiments used in gourmet recipes.
LanguageData.VCE_CondimentPrepTable.label: condiment prep table
LanguageData.VCE_CookedSoupFine.description: A complex soup assembled with care from a wide selection of ingredients.
LanguageData.VCE_CookedSoupFine.label: fine soup
LanguageData.VCE_CookedSoupGourmet.description: A culinary work of art, characterized by refined, even elaborate preparation and presentation of an aesthetically balanced, albeit low quantity soup.
LanguageData.VCE_CookedSoupGourmet.label: gourmet soup
LanguageData.VCE_CookedSoupLavish.description: A masterpiece of the culinary arts, this soup nourishes the body, mind, and soul.
LanguageData.VCE_CookedSoupLavish.label: lavish soup
LanguageData.VCE_CookedSoupSimple.description: A simple soup slow cooked from a few ingredients.
LanguageData.VCE_CookedSoupSimple.label: simple soup
LanguageData.VCE_DeepFriedBigMeat.description: Meat tenderized then filleted, then rolled in a thick batter before being submerged in hot oil and fried. The end result is a crunchy, unhealthy yet tasty soul food - Not quite as filling as a meal, but very pleasing to eat. Deep frying meats in this matter reduces shelf life as well unless frozen.
LanguageData.VCE_DeepFriedBigMeat.label: deep fried meat
LanguageData.VCE_DeepFriedFish.description: Fish tenderized then filleted, then rolled in a thick batter before being submerged in hot oil and fried. The end result is a crunchy, unhealthy yet tasty soul food - Not quite as filling as a meal, but very pleasing to eat. Deep frying meats in this matter reduces shelf life as well unless frozen
LanguageData.VCE_DeepFriedFish.label: deep fried fish
LanguageData.VCE_DeepFriedVegetables.description: Vegetables julienned then patted dry before being dunked into hot oil until golden brown. As crispy and pleasing as they are, these deep fried treats are not as filling as a normal meal, nor as healthy. Deep frying vegetables in this matter reduces shelf life as well unless frozen.
LanguageData.VCE_DeepFriedVegetables.label: deep fried vegetables
LanguageData.VCE_DeepFrier.description: A deep fryer is a kitchen appliance used for deep frying. Deep frying is a method of cooking by submerging food into oil at high heat, typically between temperatures of 350 Â°F and 375 Â°F (175 Â°C to 190 Â°C).
LanguageData.VCE_DeepFrier.label: deep fryer
LanguageData.VCE_DigestibleResurrectorNanites.descrip: An extremely high tech glitterworld concoction, unsafe to drink directly due to bitter taste and a mild case of intraventricular hemorrhaging. However, when cooked properly into food, these effects inexplicably seem nullified. Any pawns with this present upon death will immediately be revived as if by miracle.
LanguageData.VCE_DigestibleResurrectorNanites.label: digestible resurrector nanites
LanguageData.VCE_ElectricPot.description: An electric pot, also called a thermo pot, is a small appliance used for boiling water and maintaining it at a constant temperature. It is typically used to simmer soup over an extended period of time. Ingredients are submerged in water and left to cook over an extended period, allowing the flavors of the ingredients to gradually deepen and blend over time.\n\nSoup on an unpowered electric pot will spoil extremely rapidly. Beware of solar flares!
LanguageData.VCE_ElectricPot.label: electric pot
LanguageData.VCE_FineBake.description: A complex bake assembled with care from a wide selection of ingredients and flour.
LanguageData.VCE_FineBake.label: fine bake
LanguageData.VCE_FineDessert.description: A complex dessert assembled with care from a wide selection of ingredients.
LanguageData.VCE_FineDessert.label: fine dessert
LanguageData.VCE_FineGrill.description: A complex grilled meat assembled with care from a wide selection of ingredients. Very filling, grilled meats allow people to not feel hunger for a long time. Freezing them ruins this effect.
LanguageData.VCE_FineGrill.label: fine grill
LanguageData.VCE_Flour.description: Spelt flour, ideal for use in baking. Spelt flour takes a very long time to go bad, if stored in a dry environment. It was produced by spelt that has been genetically engineered to gently break into flour with a mere touch.
LanguageData.VCE_Flour.label: spelt flour
LanguageData.VCE_GourmetBake.description: A culinary work of art, characterized by refined, even elaborate preparation and presentation of an aesthetically balanced, albeit low quantity bake.
LanguageData.VCE_GourmetBake.label: gourmet bake
LanguageData.VCE_GourmetDessert.description: A culinary work of art, characterized by refined, even elaborate preparation and presentation of an aesthetically balanced, albeit low quantity dessert.
LanguageData.VCE_GourmetDessert.label: gourmet dessert
LanguageData.VCE_GourmetGrill.description: A culinary work of art, characterized by refined, even elaborate preparation and presentation of an aesthetically balanced, albeit low quantity grilled meat. Very filling, grilled meats allow people to not feel hunger for a long time. Freezing them ruins this effect.
LanguageData.VCE_GourmetGrill.label: gourmet grill
LanguageData.VCE_GowCheese.description: Gow cheese is greatly appreciated for its smooth, melting texture, and its very soft taste.
LanguageData.VCE_GowCheese.label: gow cheese
LanguageData.VCE_Grill.description: A grill is a device that cooks food by applying heat from below. This is a wood fired grill that needs wood as fuel to work.
LanguageData.VCE_Grill.label: grill
LanguageData.VCE_HairyCheese.description: Why? Why, why, why, WHY? Cheese. With hair. WHY???
LanguageData.VCE_HairyCheese.label: hairy cheese
LanguageData.VCE_HotSauce.description: A potent, spicy sauce made from blending and simmering chilis and other spices. While particularly strong hot sauces hurt at first, they are known to numb pain and work up a warm sweat shortly after consumption.
LanguageData.VCE_HotSauce.label: hot sauce
LanguageData.VCE_InsectCheese.description: A strong smelling cheese reminiscent of Roquefort. Insect cheese is white, tangy, crumbly and slightly moist.
LanguageData.VCE_InsectCheese.label: insect cheese
LanguageData.VCE_InsectJellyPreserves.description: Insect jelly cut with sweetener then sealed as a preserve. Very rich and sweet, while being surprisingly healthy.
LanguageData.VCE_InsectJellyPreserves.label: insect jelly preserves
LanguageData.VCE_Ketchup.description: A thick sauce made from stewing tomatoes, both salty and tangy in tandem with a sweet aftertaste. Perfect for meaty meals or fried foods.
LanguageData.VCE_Ketchup.label: ketchup
LanguageData.VCE_LavishBake.description: A masterpiece of the culinary arts, this bake nourishes the body, mind, and soul.
LanguageData.VCE_LavishBake.label: lavish bake
LanguageData.VCE_LavishDessert.description: A masterpiece of the culinary arts, this dessert nourishes the body, mind, and soul.
LanguageData.VCE_LavishDessert.label: lavish dessert
LanguageData.VCE_LavishGrill.description: A masterpiece of the culinary arts, this grilled meat nourishes the body, mind, and soul. Very filling, grilled meats allow people to not feel hunger for a long time. Freezing them ruins this effect.
LanguageData.VCE_LavishGrill.label: lavish grill
LanguageData.VCE_LumpyCheese.description: This lumpy cheese seems to have concentrated protein chunks, tasting like chicken nuggets. Colonists seem to like it.
LanguageData.VCE_LumpyCheese.label: lumpy cheese
LanguageData.VCE_Mayo.description: A thick emulsion of egg, oil, and other herbs. Mayonnaise, while terrible for you, adds a pleasing tang and is very calorically dense.
LanguageData.VCE_Mayo.label: mayo
LanguageData.VCE_MealGourmet.description: A culinary work of art, characterized by refined, even elaborate preparation and presentation of an aesthetically balanced, albeit low quantity meal.
LanguageData.VCE_MealGourmet.label: gourmet meal
LanguageData.VCE_MechaCheese.description: A mechanoid cheese created by pressing mechanoid milk. This isn't edible, but if consumed it will act as an incredibly powerful drug, similar to Luciferium, but without addictiveness.
LanguageData.VCE_MechaCheese.label: mecha cheese
LanguageData.VCE_NightCheese.description: The pitch black rind of this soft cheese gives it a striking contrast with its pale paste. Very nutritive.
LanguageData.VCE_NightCheese.label: night cheese
LanguageData.VCE_RatCheese.description: Once you get over the thought that this cheese was created from giant rat milk, it isn't so bad at all!
LanguageData.VCE_RatCheese.label: rat cheese
LanguageData.VCE_RawSpices.description: A variety of aromatic and pungent spices, adds several sharp notes on the tongue and puts a bit of a pep in your step.
LanguageData.VCE_RawSpices.label: spices
LanguageData.VCE_RawSugar.description: Brown sugar is a sucrose sugar product with a distinctive brown color due to the presence of sugarcane molasses, and it adds a much desired sweetness. Sugar is easily converted into energy by the body, which may result in a nice burst of energy.
LanguageData.VCE_RawSugar.label: brown sugar
LanguageData.VCE_RuinedFineGrill.description: A complex grilled meat assembled with care from a wide selection of ingredients. This grill has been frozen, and as such it is still edible but much less filling. It won't provide the "well fed" buff.
LanguageData.VCE_RuinedFineGrill.label: ruined fine grill
LanguageData.VCE_RuinedGourmetGrill.description: A culinary work of art, characterized by refined, even elaborate preparation and presentation of an aesthetically balanced, albeit low quantity grilled meat. This grill has been frozen, and as such it is still edible but much less filling. It won't provide the "well fed" buff.
LanguageData.VCE_RuinedGourmetGrill.label: ruined gourmet grill
LanguageData.VCE_RuinedLavishGrill.description: A masterpiece of the culinary arts, this grilled meat nourishes the body, mind, and soul. This grill has been frozen, and as such it is still edible but much less filling. It won't provide the "well fed" buff.
LanguageData.VCE_RuinedLavishGrill.label: ruined lavish grill
LanguageData.VCE_RuinedSimpleGrill.description: A simple grilled meat cooked from a few ingredients. This grill has been frozen, and as such it is still edible but much less filling. It won't provide the "well fed" buff.
LanguageData.VCE_RuinedSimpleGrill.label: ruined simple grill
LanguageData.VCE_Salt.description: Rock salt, like common salt, enhances the flavor profile of other ingredients it is cooked with.
LanguageData.VCE_Salt.label: salt
LanguageData.VCE_SimpleBake.description: A simple bake quickly cooked from a few ingredients and flour.
LanguageData.VCE_SimpleBake.label: simple bake
LanguageData.VCE_SimpleDessert.description: A simple dessert quickly made from a few fruits and other ingredients.
LanguageData.VCE_SimpleDessert.label: simple dessert
LanguageData.VCE_SimpleGrill.description: A simple grilled meat cooked from a few ingredients. Very filling, grilled meats allow people to not feel hunger for a long time. Freezing them ruins this effect.
LanguageData.VCE_SimpleGrill.label: simple grill
LanguageData.VCE_SmokeleafButter.description: A thickened, fatty substance made by churning milk into very thick cream, combining with smokeleaf oil and allowing it to set. Very unhealthy and hits quite a bit harder than a joint.
LanguageData.VCE_SmokeleafButter.label: smokeleaf butter
LanguageData.VCE_Sugarcane.description: A thick, tall, tropical grass with jointed stems. The Uba variety is much hardier but less productive than common sugarcane. While not exactly the most nutritious thing to eat on its own, this genetically modified sugarcane is easily milled into brown sugar and then used for a variety of culinary creations - Particularly desserts.
LanguageData.VCE_Sugarcane.label: uba sugarcane plant
LanguageData.VCE_ThrumffaloGouda.description: Thrumffalo Gouda is considered a refined delicacy. It takes a very long time to ripen, but once it is ready it is one of the most nourishing cheeses available on the Rim.
LanguageData.VCE_ThrumffaloGouda.label: thrumffalo gouda
LanguageData.VCE_UncookedSoupFine.description: An uncooked fine soup. This needs to be cooked in an electric pot to be edible.
LanguageData.VCE_UncookedSoupFine.label: uncooked fine soup
LanguageData.VCE_UncookedSoupGourmet.description: An uncooked gourmet soup. This needs to be cooked in an electric pot to be edible.
LanguageData.VCE_UncookedSoupGourmet.label: uncooked gourmet soup
LanguageData.VCE_UncookedSoupLavish.description: An uncooked lavish soup. This needs to be cooked in an electric pot to be edible.
LanguageData.VCE_UncookedSoupLavish.label: uncooked lavish soup
LanguageData.VCE_UncookedSoupSimple.description: An uncooked simple soup. This needs to be cooked in an electric pot to be edible.
LanguageData.VCE_UncookedSoupSimple.label: uncooked simple soup
LanguageData.VCE_WeirdCheese.description: A foul smelling cheese constantly dripping an oily film. It has a sour, chemical taste, which can either be considered an acquired taste or disgusting.
LanguageData.VCE_WeirdCheese.label: weird cheese
LanguageData.VCE_Wheat.description: Spelt is a species of wheat that has been cultivated since approximately 5000 BC. A good source of dietary fiber, protein (which it contains more of than common wheat), and vitamins and minerals. Spelt takes almost an entire growing season to come to fruition. While fragile and time-consuming, this cereal has been genetically engineered to gently break into flour with a mere touch.
LanguageData.VCE_Wheat.label: spelt plant
